name: 塞缪尔·阿彭策勒
name_full: 塞缪尔·阿彭策勒 Samuel Appenzeller
introduction: Samuel Appenzeller isn't just a performer; he's a natural charmer who effortlessly captivates every crowd he encounters. With his quick wit and an endless supply of funny jokes always at the ready, he lights up any room. Directors consistently praise Samuel for his authentically unique talent and an infectious personality that makes him a joy to work with. When Samuel isn't dazzling audiences with his singing and dancing, he finds adventure in the water as a PADI certified diver. He also enjoys unwinding with gaming and, to the delight of many, whipping up his truly famous grilled cheese.
